_comment: Inputs for scripts/cost_estimate.py — a deterministic, order-of-magnitude
monthly cost + carbon FLOOR for the platform. This is NOT a billing source of
truth: list prices, single region, steady-state assumptions. It exists because
Infracost in CI prices AWS infra only (no Databricks, limited Azure/GCP); this
fills the two gaps Infracost leaves — Databricks compute and the other clouds.
Edit per engagement. Prices are illustrative USD list prices, mid-2026.

databricks._comment: Serverless SQL warehouse — the one always-on compute in public mode.

infra_monthly_usd._comment: Steady-state list-price floors for the per-cloud data stores + networking.

carbon._comment: Grid carbon intensity (gCO2e/kWh) for each platform's primary region. Sources: cloud provider sustainability + public grid averages.
